findings.description: *_FIX phase archetype recording promised by spec but no implementation: convergence_loop.py has zero phase_archetype references and no task adds it. Spec scenario 'All 13 non-terminal phases' will fail for PLAN_FIX/IMPL_FIX/VAL_FIX.
DB CHECK length <=32 vs API max_length=64 mismatch — 33-64 char value passes API and fails DB.
Token-budget thresholds inconsistent: proposal=75/60, design=80, tasks=75/60-75. Pick one.
_resolve_phase_archetype_for_state_only resolution path unspecified — bridge call (network-fragile) vs static lookup (deterministic). Spec demands deterministic 'runner' for INIT.
Goal G1 overclaims 'every non-terminal phase actually dispatches' — only 7 of 13 do.
Token-budget CI gate (task 2.9b) needs a fixture recipe — _build_prompt requires PhaseRecord and artifacts_manifest, no synthetic state spec'd.
New token_budget_check.py duplicates existing phase_token_meter.measure_context. Reuse rather than fork.
'No user-facing API breakage' claim conflicts with task 3.9 tightening str→Literal enum (any non-enum legacy value now 422s).
Proposal item 4 mentions only INIT for state-only resolver; design also covers SUBMIT_PR.

Task 3.8 claims StatusReportRequest needs phase_archetype added — already at coordination_api.py:221. Real gap: heartbeat() call at line 1983 omits the field, so it never persists to agent_sessions row.
E2E test 4.1 asserts cache file deletion for every phase, but state-only INIT/SUBMIT_PR never create one. Carve out per-phase.

Test 2.9 separator regex says 'exactly one occurrence of literal SEPARATOR' but allows phase_prompt to contain '

---

' — assertion will be wrong. Use start-anchored match instead.
Cache schema_version field has no validation rule on mismatch.
VAL_REVIEW dispatch block needs explicit val_review_enabled=false guard or --no-review runs break.
Migration 0NN sequence-number coordination is manual — add CI gate for duplicate prefixes.
Spec line 16 lists 13 phases; modified requirement says only 7 dispatch — cross-link to design's dispatch matrix to discoverability.
Hardcoded enum list in CHECK constraint will silently diverge from archetypes.yaml — add CI test to assert sets equal.

Cache 'multi-agent safety' dismisses concurrent runs as 'highly unusual', but parallel-review-plan dispatches multiple vendors per phase. Make cache key (change_id, phase) or document why concurrent build-dispatch can't happen.
Inline-fallback test 4.3 omits 'cache file missing entirely' case — only covers parse error per design.
Proposal/design call it 'agent-status table'; actual table is agent_sessions. Migration SQL uses agent_sessions correctly — only prose drifted.
